children.heading: National network
children.label: a National network
children.text: From appropriations authorized under , the Secretary shall make 5-year grants to entities in each State designated as University Centers for Excellence in Developmental Disabilities Education, Research, and Service to carry out activities described in .section 15066(a)(1) of this titlesection 15063(a) of this title

children.heading: National training initiatives
children.label: b National training initiatives
children.text: From appropriations authorized under and reserved under , the Secretary shall make grants to Centers to carry out activities described in .section 15066(a)(1) of this titlesection 15066(a)(2) of this titlesection 15063(b) of this title

children.heading: Technical assistance
children.label: c Technical assistance
children.text: From appropriations authorized under and reserved under (or from funds reserved under , as appropriate), the Secretary shall enter into 1 or more cooperative agreements or contracts for the purpose of providing technical assistance described in .section 15066(a)(1) of this titlesection 15066(a)(3) of this titlesection 15083 of this titlesection 15063(c) of this title
